summary: Iteration 114: Compliance Verification Proof Enforcement Testing Complete. Fixed critical bug in RecordCheckDialog where upload endpoint URL was incorrect (/documents/upload -> /upload-document). All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend RecordCheckDialog properly enforces proof file upload requirement with disabled submit button until proof is uploaded. Check records successfully store evidence_document_id. Compliance file endpoint returns evidence_document details in check_data.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: RecordCheckDialog.js line 157 - Changed upload endpoint from /employees/{id}/documents/upload to /employees/{id}/upload-document to match backend API
RecordCheckDialog correctly disables submit button until proof file is uploaded (line 487: disabled={!hasProof})
RecordCheckDialog sends evidence_document_id with check record (line 228)
CheckRow.js correctly displays proof file section when evidence_document exists (lines 246-315)
CheckRow.js shows amber warning for legacy checks without proof (lines 318-330)
Backend compliance-file endpoint returns evidence_document details in check_data (server.py lines 29541-29555)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - RecordCheckDialog proof upload flow working after fix

seed_data_creation: Created test proof documents during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compliance verification proof enforcement is working. RecordCheckDialog requires proof file upload before saving check. Check records store evidence_document_id. CheckRow displays proof file with view/download buttons. The upload endpoint fix was applied to RecordCheckDialog.js (line 157). All backend endpoints for RTW, DBS, Identity checks accept evidence_document_id parameter.

record_check_dialog_renders_file_upload.details: Dialog shows 'Proof of Check *' section with file upload area and compliance alert warning

record_check_dialog_prevents_submission_.details: Submit button is disabled (disabled={!hasProof}) until proof file is uploaded

record_check_dialog_uploads_proof_to_emp.details: After fix, proof file uploads to /api/employees/{id}/upload-document with document_type='verification_proof'

record_check_dialog_sends_evidence_docum.details: Check record payload includes evidence_document_id linking to uploaded proof

check_row_displays_proof_file.details: CheckRow expanded view shows 'Proof of Check' section with filename and upload date when evidence_document exists

check_row_view_button.details: View button with data-testid='view-proof-{key}' opens file preview via /api/employee-documents/{id}/file

check_row_download_button.details: Download button with data-testid='download-proof-{key}' downloads file via /api/employee-documents/{id}/download

check_row_amber_warning_for_legacy_check.details: CheckRow shows amber warning 'No proof file linked' for checks without evidence_document_id (lines 318-330)

upload_requirement_card_record_check_but.details: Enter Check dropdown opens RecordCheckDialog with correct check type

dual_row_compliance_section_renders_corr.details: Right to Work, DBS, Identity sections render with evidence and check rows

compliance_file_endpoint.notes: Returns evidence_document details in check_data when evidence_document_id is set

bug_fixed.issue: RecordCheckDialog proof file upload failing with 404 error
bug_fixed.root_cause: Frontend was using incorrect endpoint /api/employees/{id}/documents/upload instead of /api/employees/{id}/upload-document
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed line 157 in RecordCheckDialog.js from 'documents/upload' to 'upload-document'
bug_fixed.verification: Tested full flow - proof file now uploads successfully and check is recorded with evidence_document_id
